Henry M. Richards. president Of
the Washington Water Power COM
pany, returned today from New
York, where he attended the annual
stockholders meeting OF his company
and is able to announce the foregoing
as the program adopted by his COM
pany for the ensuing year.


Said Mr.. Richards: "The stock
holders express themselves as well
satisfied with the showing the COM
pany has made during the past two
or three years. They have great con-
fidence in the future of Spokane and
have shown this confidence by in
creasing our capital stock $1,000, 900.
This stock was not offered for SALE
